themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Focuses on AI agents that can perform research tasks autonomously, often involving complex workflows and decision-making.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Covers AI tools that assist developers in writing, debugging, and reviewing code.

themes.name: AI workforce impact
themes.description: Examines how AI is affecting jobs, hiring trends, and the skills required in the workforce.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Highlights AI-powered platforms and software designed to facilitate and enhance various research activities.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Deals with AI capabilities for condensing large amounts of text into concise summaries, often for research or meeting notes.

themes.name: AI for product management
themes.description: Explores how AI is being applied to product development, strategy, and management processes.

themes.name: AI for design & research
themes.description: Covers AI applications that directly support the design and user research phases of product development.

themes.name: Synthetic users
themes.description: Discusses the creation and use of artificial user data or personas for testing and research purposes.

themes.name: AI chatbot research
themes.description: Focuses on research related to AI chatbots, their capabilities, limitations, and applications.

themes.name: AI sentiment feedback
themes.description: Covers the use of AI to analyze and understand user sentiment and feedback from various sources.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
